entry.title: Re: Change System Status in PM order dependend to order Type
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the issue you are facing with one order type ? Share the screenshot of the error and give your explanation clearly.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Include in job log the values of datastore configurat...
entry.content:
Good to know that substitution parameters *can* be referenced in scripts. But when I run a simple batch job that contains nothing more than a script that references a substitution parameter...

print('[$$UserDir]');

...where $$UserDir is set to "\\Server1\UserDir\" for the job's selected system configuration, the value of the substitution parameter is not displayed, and the following error occurs:

Syntax error at line <50> : <SET ("job_GV_$Condition1" = '\'N'', "job_GV_$G_ContainerCost" = '0.10000', ...

I've tried using variations of the substitution parameter (e.g., [$UserDir], [UserDir], $[UserDir], $$[UserDir], $[$$UserDir]). All such variations tend to simply generate a syntax error that lists the values of many (all?) the job's variables.

What am I missing?

Update: Looks like the problem is the use of backslashes. When I change $$UserDir from "\\Server1\UserDir\" to "//Server1/UserDir/" no error occurs and the value of the substitution parameter is displayed.

entry.title: SAP CPI - Event Mesh - Message monitoring and multiple runs for iFlow
entry.content:
Hello Community!

So, I have this iFlow that consumes a message from the Event Mesh and does X. This is good most of the times, but sometimes I will see this in the log:

The process is configured to redeliver a message 1 time on the Event Mesh side, and to try reprocessing a message 1 time on the iFlow, and so when I tested this, I could see 2 runs for a failed message. 

However here I see multiple runs (3 or 4 depending on the day), and I can see all runs in status completed.  Furthermore, unlike my testing, all these runs have processed a different message from Event Mesh, so it looks like all these runs are all bundled for some reason, and I have no idea why. I have also confirmed that all runs were successful, since I see the result in the destination system.

I thought this "runs" section was showing all the runs for a given message that failed on a previous run, but this is not the case.

I know I am missing something; I just don't know what.

I am happy to provide any more details that might be needed. Any tip will be helpful!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Analyst Certification
entry.content: Thanks for sharing Megan! Great way to stay relevant in today's competitive job market.

entry.title: What happens when a Data Flow fails?
entry.content:
You are using DSP as a Data Fabric to load multiple data sources, and all works great, and you can enjoy life (you know, teleworking from some heavenly place) ... until something goes wrong. You receive an email that a Data Flow has failed. That SFTP seems to be not as reliable as it should be, so now what?

Leave your Virgin Mojito and open DSP.

 

 

 

 

Test definition

The test consists of loading a CSV with 30,000 rows by means of a Data Flow, and to provoke an error in the middle of the process, to see what we obtain in the destination table.

The CSV has 30000 rows, with two fields:

  • ID: consecutive numeric
  • VAL: string with the value '1' in all rows except 20101 which has a 'AAA'.

The source is SFTP, configuring the CSV as:

  • ID as Int32
  • VAL as String(1).
  • Control Fetch Size active to 1000 rows.
  • Fail Run on String Truncate = On. This will cause row 20101 to give an error for exceeding the defined size of string(1).

The destination is a DSP local table with

  • ID: int32
  • VAL: String (1)
  • Control Fetch Size active to 1000 rows.

 

Test Results

The execution of the data flow ends with error.

In the destination table, data has been saved, specifically the IDs ranging from 1 to 19000.
So I draw two conclusions:
- The most important is that the DF execution is not an “all or nothing” type, and commits have been made during the process.
- The second conclusion is that as we have two fetch controls, in source and in destination, it seems that this makes that the block of rows 19,001-20,000 has not been loaded even if it did not have any error, surely, when the block of 1,000 rows with error was read the exception was thrown, and the part that saves in the destination had not yet processed the block of 19,001-20,000, and that is why we do not have it.

I did a second test by increasing the rows to 110,000, leaving the wrong row at 105,001, and removing the fetch size control on both sides, to check if the theoretical maximum limit of the fetch size is 100,000.
But it saved from row 1 to 104,000 ... implying that the fetch size was not 100,000. I don't know if the value it takes depends on the source, the combination of them, etc.

 

Which implies

When doing ETLs with delta loads that are manually managed based on e.g. timestamps, there is a risk that when an error occurs, rows from a failed load are left in the target table.
This may cause the calculation of the next timestamp to be loaded to be erroneous, so these rows should be deleted before their calculation.

entry.title: Knowledge Graphs - Datasphere vs HANA Cloud
entry.content:
There are some key differences between the graph capabilities in SAP HANA Cloud and the new announcement SAP Datasphere knowledge graph:

1. SAP HANA Cloud has had a powerful graph engine for analyzing complex relationships in business data for a while now. It allows creating graph workspaces from existing tables/views, querying graphs using openCypher, writing custom graph algorithms, and visualizing graphs.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-hana-graph-resources/ba-p/13505490

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oaSQu9laYKE

 

2. Datasphere Creating knowledge graphs manually is very costly, so SAP Datasphere comes to help by automatically pre-populating them using content already available in SAP Datasphere like connections to source systems, tables, foreign keys etc. SAP Datasphere knowledge graph is a new capability announced in March 2024. As data is onboarded and integrated into SAP Datasphere, it automatically creates an ontology representing the relationships in the data, including business context from SAP sources like S/4HANA

caption by SAP. Currently in Preview

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PQrFjthwOWQ&t=169

https://news.sap.com/2024/03/future-of-data-driven-business-new-sap-datasphere-capabilities/

Conclusion

While the SAP HANA Cloud graph is more for custom graph algorithm development and analysis, the SAP Datasphere knowledge graph is an automated capability that provides a rich context for generative AI use cases by capturing complex data relationships and metadata. The two serve different but complementary purposes in the SAP data and analytics portfolio.

Additional information:
https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-use-sap-hana-cloud-graph-model-analyze-complex-your-holitschke

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-hana-graph-resources/ba-p/13505490

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/native-hana-vs-sap-datasphere-findings/qaq-p/12689997

https://www.techzine.eu/blogs/data-management/117331/sap-expands-datasphere-with-knowledge-graph-and-compass/

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-datasphere-is-an-alternative-of-sap-hana-modelling-with-more-features/qaq-p/12701049

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/access-sap-hana-cloud-underneath-of-sap-datasphere/ba-p/13569825

https://developers.sap.com/group.hana-aa-graph-overview.html

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content: Hello Vera, many thanks for your reply! You give a really good guidance! First things first, you are right! My colleague only imported the cimsap files, so I thought we have an up to date CR content, but we didn't! I fixed that, I launched the report RLAPI_MANUAL_SINGLE_SYNC against the Solman Java system. Unfortunately it didn't help! I also checked SAP note 3297242, but the system says that the note can't be implemented. So I am further stuck on this and this point is still red 😞 Do you have any further ideas please ? Many thanks!

entry.title: HANA Wrong File
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We installed a new HANA DB and an S4HANA Server. Everything worked perfectly. However, we've now found that the HANA filesystems were completely reorganized or moved. No one has moved or changed these data. Thus, the HANA DB doesn't start. The files are now located on the OS as follows: /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data/mnt00001 (the mnt00001 file is located here). On another server, where the HANA DB starts without any issues, there is no mnt00001 file in this directory. Additionally, the SID directory under /hana/data/ has been found missing. Similarly, the SID directory under /hana/log/ has also been found missing.
We created an SID directory under /hana/log/ and /hana/data/. Then, we moved the mnt00001 file from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data/mnt00001 to /hana/log/SID and /hana/data/SID. After that, we created a link from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data to /hana/data/SID and from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/log to /hana/log/SID. And we were able to start the database.

How can we resolve this without a symbolic link?

 

Many Thanks

Best Regards

Rashmi

entry.title: SAP Data Archiving
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have such an issue that I am working on, and I wonder if you have had a similar situation.
Let's say the company archives files and we have several application servers.
On one particular server, there is a dedicated disk where the file is archived.
The address is written in the transaction FILE, where you specify the logical path.
The situation is as follows: on the first application where the disk is allocated, Files are archived if only that application is enabled and others are disabled.
If other applications are enabled, the file is not physically archived, and it says that a specific archived file cannot be opened.
Have you ever had a similar situation, and if so, how did you solve a similar problem?

entry.title: Re: Write permissions to SAP Datasphere via OAuth and RES...
entry.content:
Hi Håkan,

I see you've also posted a related question too here Is writing to SAP Datasphere using OData4 / REST supported?

I could add more comments. SAP Datasphere has OData API for both Catalog and Consumption but all APIs are GET --only for reading from external app--

If you meant pushing data from external with REST / OData API to Datasphere it's not available. But you can pull data via OData connection in Datasphere with OAuth authentication, see Generic OData Connections

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Data binding issue in sap UI5
entry.content:
Hello,
I am new to Fiori front-end development and I was given a request to change the description of an already existing field. It seemed pretty easy. I have made the text dynamic by using TVARVC values. But after changing the field heading, the value entered in that field is not getting captured. 
Initially the Field name used to be "Pieces" and based on the plant it should display as "Pieces/Layers". The data entered in the field is getting captured if it is either "Pieces" or "Layers" but when I display it as "Pieces/Layers" i am getting the issue. 
I thought it maybe due to the length of the text and tried different combinations but nothing worked. 
Can someone please let me know why these kind of errors may occur and where can I look in the code or which file maybe helpful to resolve this issue? 

all the other fields are working as expected.


Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
That is the Oracle.NET driver, not the standard Oracle client. You need to have the full version of the Oracle Client installed with a tnsnames.ora file configured in order to fully use the native Oracle connection type in Crystal.

The Oracle.NET driver requires loading the full .NET framework and then working through that.  The regular Oracle Client doesn't have the overhead of loading .NET and is much faster.

-Dell

entry.title: Is it possible to create and Exception with MC/1 for the sum of valuated stock of two warehouses?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to create an Exception in MC.1 with MC/1 Exception Creation, but I need to check as threshold value, the total SUM of two warehouses at the same time.

Let say I have one work center, and two warehouses. The point is to create an exception for the total value sum of the Valuated Stock for both warehouses taking into account the sum of the two warehouses at the same time, instead of each one separatedly.

Example:

 

Valuated stock at Warehouse A = 1000 EUR

Valuated stock at Warehouses B = 1500 EUR

Exception value = A+B > 2000 EUR.

 

Is that possible?

 

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Service entry sheet mass upload / Replacement of ML81...
entry.content:
Thank you. I tried MM_PUR_SES_UPLOAD and filled in the three tabs but always received the following error even I haven't changed the account assignment. What was wrong in my file?

Header:

Header ID* (10)Name of Service Entry Sheet* (40)Reference Purchase Order* (10)Posting Date for Goods Receipt
0000000001Test/Support/05/2024770034192020240529

Item:

Header ID* (10)Item ID* (5)Purchase Order Item* (5)Performance Start Date*Performance End DateItem Description (40)Stated Quantity* (10dec3)Account Assignment Category ** (1)Has multiple Account Assignments** (TRUE/FALSE/Blank)Work Item ID (10)Service Performer (10)Is Final Entry (TRUE/FALSE/Blank)
0000000001000100001020240529  0,01     

Account Assignment (U in PO):

Header ID* (10)Item ID* (5)Acct Assgmt ID* (2)Quantity** (10dec3)G/L Account** (10)Asset** (12)Subnumber** (4)Sales Order** (10)Sales Order Item** (6)Cost Center** (10)Order** (12)Network** (12)Activity** (4)WBS Element** (8)
000000000100010000010,01          

When I kept the last sheet of account assignment empty, I received an ABAP runtime error.

entry.title: Re: Next button missing Guided Tour SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi J,

Unfortunately, it is not clear what is going wrong because you have selected the option that should make the Next button appear.  It's almost like the context is changing from one step to the next so the GT thinks there is no next step.  I think that you will need to get support involved with this one so raise a ticket using Component ID KM-SEN-CMP and get them to take a look in more detail.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Need to send E-Mail for the same partner.
entry.content:
Hello Experts;

 

Need your help with this requirement; we have created an output that will trigger an E-Mail to the Ship-to Party of the deliveries we added into that shipment.

In test environment I created 5 Deliveries from 5 Individual sales orders (3 With different Ship-to partners and 2 with same Ship-to party created on purpose).

The E-mail’s body says “Dear (Ship-to name); we are generating (Shipment number) for your (Sales Order number)”

Upon creating the Shipment, only 4 outputs are determined since there are 4 Ship-to parties and as per SAP’s std. design we cannot have 2 outputs for the same partner.

 

Ship-to #1 --> SO# 2601 --> Delivery# 80001987 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #2 --> SO# 2602 --> Delivery# 80001988 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #3 --> SO# 2603 --> Delivery# 80001989 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #4 --> SO# 2604 --> Delivery# 80001990 --> Output gets determined

Ship-to #4 --> SO# 2605 --> Delivery# 80001991 --> Output DOES NOT get determined, Since the Output already exist for this Ship-to.

 

In this case we still need to have a fifth E-Mail sent to Ship-to #4 since this customer has 2 different Sales Orders (2604 & 2605) being shipped in the same shipment; Would it be possible achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Best of Suite vs. Modern Data Stack
entry.content:
I just have seen a talk between Martin Kleppmann and Jesse Anderson about “Designing A Data-Intensive Future” from GOTO 2023 event. Martin Kleppmann and he said “When you get to large data workload, if you have a single tool that can do everything, the only way that can do that is by doing everything badly.“

I think this is a basic idea where the Modern Data Stack (MDS) evolve from. The idea of Modern Data Stack and how it evolved, is described in my former blog Data Architecture with SAP – Modern Data Stack. Over the time many characteristics where added what a MDS must archive:

 

Fig. 1: Characteristics of the Modern Data Stack

The idea was, to create a Best-of-Breed software architecture for data, which brought together the best fit of data capabilities needed to create maximum of value from data for the enterprise. But is this idea of having always the best tool doing this job is still valid?

While Best-of-Breed is not a new idea, we have seen the pendulum swings from Best-of-Breed to Best-of-Suite in the data world and back again. Currently even the end of the MDS was proclaimed. Why? Because over time several developments happend:

  • Customers became more price sensitive and data tools became standard in companies. Standards are goal for optimization so it is easier to manage licences, support, etc by one or at least a few reduces complexity and costs.

  • Differentiation between providers is increasingly disappearing. The evolution of cloud services is fast. From the capability perspective Best-of-Suite solutions like SAP and Oracle catched up. It is more about evolution speed, partnership and details now.

  • MDS is converging to a Best-of-Suite. I see that particularly for Google Cloud with BigQuery in the center of the stack where Google is able to offer a End-to-End approach and simliar for Databricks except the BI part. Snowflake is possibly still the most representative MDS data platform and really celebrating the ecosystem idea with strong partnerships. But they are also growing there own stack with innovations like Streamlit, Snowpipe and Snowpark.

  • Customers coming from one side shifting over time to a mixed scenario to adapt to the advantages of the other side. Means customer starting e. g. with Databricks on Microsoft Azure adapting more and more Azure services over time as the Suite approach making things easier (integration, less vendors, good enough services, …). Same If you start with a suite but extend for new BI tools, ETL/ELT and other components to complete or compensate.

  • Best-of-Suite vendors like SAP are embracing data ecosystems with partners like Collibra, DataRobot, Confluent and Databrick to close gaps and offer alternatives for a better adaption of the data stack.

  • Maybe a short term trend but something I see, is the shifted focus from data to AI with the ChatGPT/LLM hype. Maybe this pendelum will come back when people understand that data is the base for AI and even more for data-centric AI (compared to discriminative/generative AI).

  • Once I read, the biggest lie of a data architecture picture is that there is only one data platform in the middle. There is at least one old, one new, one from an acquisition, in germany at least you will find a extra one for HR. From a certain size or complexity companies today have several data platforms and redundant tools. It’s the new normal somehow.

The last aspect brings us to a new perspective. We need maybe best of both worlds because every world (Best-of-Suite / Best-of-Breed) have their advantaged (and disadvantages).

 

Fig 2: Combining characteristics of Best-of-Breed (MDS) and Best-of-Suite (here: SAP) 

So now if we think a little bit further, these worlds are converging into a open ecosystem which not only adapts to the best fit for creating value from data, but also adapt optimal to the operational ecosystem like SAP driven enterprises as a next level of ecosystems.

 Fig. 3: Convergence of MDS and Best-of-Suite vendors into a data ecosystem

We thougt deeply about this development in our latest whitepaper about SAP & Modern Data Stack available here (1) (in german only at the moment).

An extended excerpt can be found here with Snowflake and here with Databricks.

What do you think or experience where data stacks evolve? Is one vendor delivering everything for you and doing well? Do you build an ecosystem of tools to solve complex problems or is the MDS-approach still the best helping you in your daily data business?

-----------------------

This blog was initially posted on Substack.

----------------------- 

(1) https://www.infomotion.de/whitepaper-sap-modern-data-stack

entry.title: Re: Adapting to technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Updates for SAP S/4HANA and SAP ERP
entry.content:
Hello @aleshane_ghisleri,

Is there a way you can share XML structure generated by SAP for an invoice in foreign currency (ex. USD) for Colombia?

Im struggling with XML creation to be approved by DIAN. 

My current issue is in attached screen.

All these notes are already implemented in our ECC system.

  • SAP Note 3420596 - Technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Rounding removal and healthy taxes
  • SAP Note 3426328 - Technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Foreign currency proxy changes
  • SAP Note 3459015 - Technical annex 1.9 for Colombia: Foreign currency proxy changes - Part 2#colombia #annexversion1.9

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: "maximum report processing job limit"
entry.content:
Hi Don, thank you for your attention. I'm answering here because can't find an "answer" button for your comment

Try clearing your cache, Browsers can keep alive the printjob: I'll will investigate how to do that.

CR for VS has always limited users to 3 active printjobs, so something your app is keeping them alive, you need to add debugging or logging steps to see what it's doing: do you need some piece of code or my app?

What OS and version of IIS are you using? Windows Server 2012 R2. IIS 8.5.9600.16384

Didn't describe the steps your app is using or any work flow when this happens so it's hard to say what you need to change: do you need some piece of code or my app?

Did it work before, if so what has changed in your environment? It always happens in the production environment.

If using another Reporting tool is your only option then good luck on the change: yes, I know, that's why I want to keep using CR.

Regards

Demacom

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content: Dear Customer, what what now? It takes several hours to sync the content from SLD to LMDB. It's suggested to clear the browser cache and execute the step again.

entry.title: Re: Need guidance
entry.content:
Hi,

 

run transaction code OB53 there will be two columns PL Statmt acct type and Account enter x in the first column and leave the account column blank.

Then you must most likely need to also create the G/L account, that you want to post to.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Approval Matrix in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi

This was a big problem for me, the solution was to make an add-on that reads the authorized sketches and saves them. I created a user in SAP called "automation" with the indirect license to perform the processing, so I know that it was my "little robot" that recorded the sketch.

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 9.3 PL14 - SQL SERVER 2014

entry.title: Re: remote access SQL Management Studio installed in Azur...
entry.content:
Hello, I don't know how your server is, but in the Microsoft AZ-900 course I made for external access you must release the Public IP and accept connections, read this post that I did this in the course and I was able to access the server.

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/76590409/how-to-enable-public-access-to-azure-sql-database

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-sql/database/firewall-configure?view=azuresql

Of course, you'll have to be the admin of everything to make these settings.

Rgs

Fabio

SAP 9.3 PL14 - SQL SERVER 2014.

entry.title: Re: Error of Posting Period while making AP invoice
entry.content:
Hi.

Depending on the document, if it is a document that has a journal entry and the general ledger has already closed the month, the user will have to change the date of the document before changing the outline to the current month, but if it has not yet closed the month or if it is a document that does not generate an LCM (for example, purchase order, Sales Order, Purchase Request), just open the month and ask the user to add it.

Of course, you can make some improvements to the system. I made an alert here where it warns the user that there is a document to authorize, and there is an authorized document that must be released.

Rgs

Fabio.

SAP 9.3 PL14 - SQL SERVER 2014

entry.title: How to Handle VMI on Subcontracted Assemblies
entry.content:
Background:
We are currently transitioning to a Vendor Managed Inventory (VMI) model for a specific motor part that is used in two different higher-level assemblies (BOMs). One BOM will continue to use the motor we purchase directly from the manufacturer A, while the other BOM will use the same motor part number supplied directly to our subcontractor through a VMI program. Critical to note these motors are exactly the same and have the same material master.
Goal:
Our primary goal is to ensure accurate demand planning and avoid over-purchasing the motor we buy directly and send to subcontractor number 1. We need to make sure that the consumption of the VMI motor at the subcontractor number 2 is properly reflected in our SAP system so that it is considered when calculating the overall demand for the motor.
Challenges:

  • The VMI motor and the directly purchased motor share the same material master and part number, making it difficult to distinguish between them in SAP. That material master is used on two BOMs. One BOM is manufactured by subcontractor A and one is manufacturered by subcontractor B.
  • We need to find a way to automatically capture the VMI motor usage at the subcontractor and integrate it into our demand planning process.
    Potential Solutions:
    We are exploring the following solutions within SAP to achieve our goal:
  • Consumption-Based Planning (MRP): We want to leverage MRP to calculate the overall demand for the motor based on the consumption of both BOMs. This requires accurate recording of the VMI motor usage at the subcontractor (e.g., through goods issue transactions).
  • Subcontracting with Component Supplied by Vendor: We are investigating if this functionality can help us automatically track the VMI motor usage. This would involve creating a subcontracting purchase order where the vendor supplies the motor directly to the subcontractor, and the consumption is automatically recorded in SAP.
    Questions for the SAP Community:
  • Has anyone successfully implemented either of these solutions (MRP or Subcontracting) to track VMI motor usage and integrate it into demand planning?
  • Are there any specific configuration steps or best practices we should be aware of when setting up these processes in SAP?
  • Are there any alternative solutions or workarounds within SAP that we should consider?
  • Any insights or advice on potential challenges or pitfalls we might encounter during implementation would be greatly appreciated.
    We are open to any suggestions or recommendations from the SAP community on how to best achieve our goal of accurate demand planning and inventory management for this motor part.

entry.title: Migration of user personalization from Classic Home (Fiori Groups) to Spaces and Pages
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support,

We are planning to migrate from the Classic Home Page (Fiori Groups) to Spaces and Pages. We'd like to explore options for automatically transferring user customizations from the My Home page to the new Home Page. Ideally, this would involve a mass activation process that imports personalized settings for all users, rather than manually migrating for one user.

Specifically, we want to ensure that user adaptations like added apps, created groups, converted tiles to links, and saved bookmarks are transferred to the new My Home page within Spaces and Pages.

Could you please share any relevant Knowledge Base Articles (KBAs) or documentation on how to achieve this user personalization migration before the switch to Spaces and Pages?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Migration of user personalization from Classic Home (...
entry.content:
Hello there,

I hope you're doing well.

 

Please check out the SAP Community blog:

  • SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – How to migrate from groups to spaces and pages

Other invaluable resources:

  • How to find what Fiori apps has the Spaces and Pages layout
  • External reference Tutorial (YouTube) expert user: How to migrate groups to spaces and pages
  • SAP Learning Hub (How to create spaces and pages) Tutorial
  • KBA 3436068 - Fiori migration from Classic to Spaces and Pages Mode Info on Importing Personalization

 

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Is it not possible to perform inspection for incoming goods using RFUI in embedded EWM ?
entry.content:
Is it not possible to perform inspection for incoming goods using RFUI in embedded EWM ?

The requirement is to scan an inspection slip printed during GR and perform inspection using RF.

entry.title: How to skip inspection rule usage in EWM ?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have the below requirement.

1) Receive goods into an IM location and perform inspection.

2) After inspection, the goods are transferred to EWM.

3) "01" inspection is active and inspection is method chosen in EWM is based on material master and not rule.

4) System creates an inspection lot also for the transfer delivery (DIG) during GR ?

How can we avoid this ?

entry.title: Re: Series period does not match current period 65171 SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi.

Check two points.

Document numbering.

 

Authorization 

Rgs

Fabio 

SAP 9.3 PL14 - SQL 2014

Rgs

Fabio

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing Interactive Value Journeys (IVJs)
entry.content:
Is it possible to translate the pages to differet languaes?

Even after chnaging the language from the dropdown, it is providing a limited translation.

entry.title: How can I upload a public key of SFTP server into BTP CPI.
entry.content:
I need upload a public key of an SFTP server into SAP BTP CPI  to read a file .But always getting an error "cannot load key".

Steps followed :
1. Created a new file called test_key.pub and copy pasted the public received.
2. Navigate to BTP CPI->Security Materials -> Manage Keystore ->Add -> SSH key.
3. Entered the Region,Alias,Common name etc.

entry.title: About Business Partner Supplier Company and Customer Company Credit Memo Payment Terms
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I used OData V2 API: Business Partner (A2X) to do the Create or Update the Business Partner Data

We want to set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms] same with [Payment Terms]

But in this API it has not this [Credit Memo Payment Terms] Schema

Can I ask for, If I set the Schema [Payment Terms] but I have not set the [Credit Memo Payment Terms]

Will there be any impact? Or can I have some [Credit Memo Payment Terms] information to know what does this Schema do?

entry.title: Need in LOGIC CANVAS a new flow function "Convert base64 to file saved locally"
entry.content:
Hello Support Team,

@Dan_Wroblewski , @MaiaraEllwanger , @marihirvi

We have only two flow functions in LOGIC CANVAS related to Base64 conversion

-Download Base64 text as file (Web only)

-Convert file to base64

Could you please put in market place the reverse flow function of "Convert file to base64" which would be "Vonvert base64 to file which can be saved locally automatically" and without need of web connection?

It is urgent, Thank you!

Chung Chan CHI

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Provision and Decommission
entry.content:
I want to provision SAP Cloud ALM on Australia region.
If I want to switch it to Japan region, do I need to provision and configure it again or SAP will migrate it for free.
If I have to configure it again, can I delete and re-provision it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Provision and Decommission
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Moving your SAP Cloud ALM tenant to a different data center is not supported.
To change the data center of the SAP Cloud ALM, you need to decommission the old SAP Cloud ALM Tenant, and set up a new subaccount on the new data center with a different subdomain. Please refer to the KB for details.

##3352417 - Dismantle and then Resubscribe SAP Cloud ALM in different Data Center

Best regards,
Peng

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Provision and Decommission
entry.content: https://me.sap.com/notes/3352417

entry.title: Re: dynamically resize width of tables next to each other?
entry.content:
Hi @eeddggaarr , 

We encourage users to ask all technical and product specific questions in the Q&A forum on the community. I suggest posting your question in Technology Q&A | SAP Community, and use the "SAP Analytics Cloud" tag.

The D&A discussion area is meant for starting conversations on industry trends, best practices, etc.

Best,

Megan

entry.title: GRC Master User id Mapping
entry.content:
Hi All,

GRC 12, sp20

The Master user id mapping table in SPRO>GRC>Access Control is not getting filled up for ABAP connectors through repository sync job, even after maintaining them in 1055.

Please clarify for which type of connectors and how the above table can be filled up for ABAP connectors

Regards

entry.title: Issue with material dublicates
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts, 

I am writing to seek your assistance with a significant issue we are experiencing with duplicate materials in our SAP system. Our materials are sourced from another standardized system, where the quality of duplication checks is unfortunately quite poor. Consequently, users can create duplicate materials, which we then block in SAP to maintain data integrity. However, these blocked materials are still being used in various purchase requisitions, leading to incomplete transactions as the system recognizes the materials as blocked. We are currently addressing this issue manually by replacing each blocked material with the appropriate active one in existing requisitions. This process is highly inefficient and time-consuming. We are in urgent need of a more streamlined solution.

Specifically, we would like to know if there is a way to automate the replacement of duplicate materials with their corresponding active materials in all existing requisitions.

Additionally, is it possible to transfer all stock quantities from a duplicate material to the correct material, thereby consolidating our inventory?

Your expert guidance on how to achieve these solutions within SAP would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for your assistance. 

Best regards, Zhanel

entry.title: Re: UI5's unified test tech stack

Any idea on how to fix it?

Can any one share the best practises to in SAP to map Software licenses sales using SAP sales and distribution.

Like what should be material type, item category group & item category ? We don't want these to be delivery relevant .

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Microsoft Addin / Admin role nece...
entry.content:
Not necessarily to be Adim user to access BW queries. And there are no particular roles needed for SAC users to access BW queries in SAC add-in for MS office.

Just cross check once, user used for BW connection creation in SAC has required authorizations in BW.

entry.title: Re: AI Assisted Skills Architecture Creation
entry.content:
Thank you @ranshapira . Sharing my inputs.

1. We are planning to use a combination - Job profiles which do not have Recruiting linkage will continue to check the Job Profile descriptions. And, for Job profiles which are linked to Recruiting, we will check for the Job Requisitions. Again, there will be variations like Position based job profiles would not be considered and so on. When we deliver this feature for Recruiting, we will update this blog and provide more information(we do not have a specific date which can be announced now).

2. Upgrade is a one time capability and cannot be run again after it was successfully upgraded. After the first run, it is more likely you have necessary skills repository wherein you can start using Talent Intelligence Hub and maintain them over there. At this point, Admin users whenever they create a new job profile and want to assign a skill to a role, they would have to do that from Job Profile Builder.

3. It is content driven AI skills extractions. So, it really actually depends on how much skills relevant content is available in your Job Profile description.

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics cloud: table filters disappear when rem...
entry.content:
Hi rosanna_chiarazzo, 

  FYI, it's confirmed to be a bug and will be fixed in future patches. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Regarding Unable to Activate with error messages in 'Manage Contract' App
entry.content:
I am writing to inquire about the inability to activate in the 'Manage Contract' app.

While attempting to create and activate a contract using the Manage Contract app, we encountered the following error, preventing successful activation:

" Activation is not possible due to warnings(Posting Term) "

Is this error message raised because of these remained option? (Contract Management APP)

Despite attempting to create the contract with the same details in test tenant, we are unable to determine the root cause of this issue.


I urgently inquire about an issue that needs to be resolved by the end of May.

Could you please provide insight into the cause of this error message? 

Additionally, if there are any steps we can take to resolve this issue, your advice would be greatly appreciated.  We are in great need of your assistance.

entry.title: Re: List of users authorized for reports in SAC
entry.content:
Hi atillacemyildiz, 

   You may check with menu System -> Overview -> Tab 'Story' -> Click tile 'Stories' -> in table below, select the story you are interested -> click 'Fact sheet' -> a new application will be open in a separate browser tab -> go tab 'Security', you should see a list of user/team who is shared to. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Show/Hide Table columns in SAC Dashboard with Linked...
entry.content:
Hi GavinMonteiro3,

  For such use case, I would suggest to use data analyzer instead of story table. Or you could allow user to navigate from story table to data analyzer where he can freely decide how to analyze the data. Check this help page for more detail: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/3bd79ad3e58442e7a5499fd9c547cbb3.html?q=data%20analyzer

Best regards, William

entry.title: 【重要なお知らせ】SAP Analytics Cloud：従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスとアナリティクスアプリケーションに関する変更
entry.content:
このブログはImportant Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud C... - SAP Communityを日本語訳したものになります。

はじめに

長年お客様とパートナーにサービスを提供してきた従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスとアナリティクスアプリケーションを廃止いたします。テクノロジーの進化とユーザーの期待の変化に伴い、従来の機能に加え、より多くの機能・汎用性・パフォーマンス向上・使いやすさを備えた最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスへの移行を決定いたしました。最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスはストーリー、アナリティクスアプリケーション、およびDigital Boardroomのコア機能を統合し、SAP Analytics Cloudyユーザーライセンスでご利用いただけます。

本ブログでは、従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスを廃止する理由、最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの利点、移行スケジュールについて説明いたします。このブログ記事が皆様の変化への準備と最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの最大限の活用に役立てば幸いです。

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスを廃止する理由

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスは、信頼性が高く安定したUIでしたが、ユーザーエクスペリエンスやパフォーマンスに影響するいくつかの制限や欠点もありました。非推奨とする主な理由は以下のとおりです：

  • パフォーマンスとユーザビリティ：お客様からいただいたフィードバックによると、従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスには、パフォーマンスとユーザビリティに関していくつかの課題がありました。
  • 統一性：ビジネスのユースケースに応じて、どのアセット（ストーリー、アナリティクスアプリケーション、Digital Boardroom）を使うべきかの判断が難しいことがありました。
  • イノベーション：最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスのみに対して新機能の搭載や改善を行っています。

最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの利点

最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスはストーリー、アナリティクスアプリケーション、およびDigital Boardroomのコア機能を組み合わせたプラットフォームで、SAP Analytics Cloud ユーザーライセンスで利用することができます。従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスにはない新しい機能、多様性、より優れたパフォーマンスとユーザビリティを一貫して提供します。

利点の詳細については、リソースセクションの外部ブログ記事をお読みください。

スケジュールと影響

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスおよびそれに関連する機能と、製品戦略上、非推奨とするその他の機能について段階的な廃止を進めています。

廃止の対象は以下の機能です：

  • 従来のストーリー（グリッドレイアウトとスマートディスカバリを含む）
  • アナリティクスアプリケーション（ストーリーと統合）（ブログ）
  • Digital Boardroom（ストーリーと統合）（ブログ）
  • 従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションにおける利用頻度の低い機能（ヘルプポータル）
  • インサイト検索（Cloud FoundryテナントではJust Askに置き換わる）
  • 割当（データアクション割当ステップに置き換わる）
  • POI

段階的な移行を促進するための機能を順次追加しており、すでに利用可能になっているものもいくつかあります。例えば：

  • 従来の割当メニューを選択すると、新しいデータアクション割当ステップを利用するようにユーザーをガイドする警告が表示されます。
  • 2024年5月18日付で公開したSAP Analytics Cloudの2024年Q2 QRCリリースでは、従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションを編集モードで開いた際に、アプリ内非推奨警告を表示します。

移行スケジュールについて以下の点にご注意ください。なお、これは現時点での計画であり、SAPによって今後変更される可能性があります：

  • 2024年 Q4 QRC：新規に作成されたテナントは、上記の非戦略的な機能を利用することができません。作成済みコンテンツパッケージに廃止対象のアセット（従来のストーリーエクスペリエンス、アナリティクスアプリケーションなど）が含まれている場合、そのパッケージはインポートすることができません。
  • 2025年 上半期：既存テナントを使用中のお客様は、廃止対象のアセットを新規作成または複製することができなくなります。ただし作成済みアセットの閲覧、編集、共有は引き続き行うことができます。一定期間以上閲覧されていないアセットを自動削除するための新しい設定オプションがシステム管理者向けのメニューに追加されます。
  • 2025年 下半期：廃止対象アセットにアクセスできなくなります。期限までにコンテンツを移行する必要があります。

準備方法

この移行には、お客様側での計画や準備が必要になる場合があります。ここでは、従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションについて、移行に向けた準備手順をご紹介します：

  • 最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスとその利点については、リソースセクションの外部ブログ記事をお読みください。
  • 最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスで利用できなくなる機能の詳細はドキュメントでご覧いただけます。：最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスの制限事項について | SAP Help Portal
  • 既存の従来のストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションのデザイナでツールバーの［ファイル］－［保存］－［最適化されたデザインエクスペリエンスに変換］オプションを使用し、最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスに移行します。

おわりに

従来のストーリーエクスペリエンスの廃止と最適化されたストーリーエクスペリエンスへの移行は、お客様とパートナー様にとって長期的にメリットのある戦略的判断です。この移行プロセスへのご理解とご協力に感謝いたします。弊社は、引き続き最高レベルのユーザーエクスペリエンスとパフォーマンスを提供することに尽力してまいります。

リソース（英語ブログ）

最適化されたエクスペリエンスのみの新機能ハイライト
  • コンポジット（日本語ヘルプポータル：コンポジット入門 | SAP Help Portal）
  • モデルの置換（日本語ヘルプポータル：ストーリー内のモデルの置換 (最適化済み) | SAP Help Portal）
  • プレゼンテーションモード（日本語ヘルプポータル：プレゼンテーションモードの使用 | SAP Help Portal）
アナリティクスアプリケーション統合のメリット
  • 新しいデザインエクスペリエンス
  • ストーリーとアナリティクスアプリケーションの統合
パフォーマンスとユーザビリティの向上
  • アクティブビューポートレンダリング
  • 簡易ビューア（日本語ヘルプポータル：簡易ビューアの使用制限 | SAP Help Portal）
  • 主な改善点と特徴
  • パフォーマンスとユーザビリティの向上

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Elements Action button that invokes a CDS Function (not an Action)?
entry.content: Tested this and functions doesn't seem to trigger in js handler in SAPUI5 v1.124.0, CDS V7.9.2. Actions and manually calling a function works

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Instance Deleted from Trial althoug...
entry.content: Same Issue with me too!

entry.title: Addons are removed automatically after restart the server
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

We want to know the reason, when we restart the server our Addons are removed automatically.
What could be the reason.

Waiting for response, please share your thoughts.

Regards,

Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Allocation: Part 4: Allocation using a Calculated Account
entry.content:
Hi @jraymond15!

Any chance to make this work without an account dimension in the model?

I tried a similar approach using a calculated measure to generate a driver based on the previous year's actuals but the allocation did not work. I tested the same allocation using values in the same year for the driver plan values and it worked so I am guessing the issue is related to using the cacl measure instead of the calc account member. Have you tried something similar?

KR,

Pedro

entry.title: Customer with multiple distribution channels
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I m working on a Customer payment performance report in which a customer is assigned multiple distribution channels. In the report, the functional consultants have fixed the distribution channels '02' '07' and '10'. So in my select query, I have filtered the customers by distribution channels '02', '07' and '10'. Now as per the consultants requirement, customers having distribution channels '03' and '10' should not be displayed. But since distribution channel - '10' is included in select query, this customer is also displayed. Please see screenshot below. So how can the customer with distribution channel '03' and '10' be excluded?

entry.title: Re: Need to send E-Mail for the same partner.
entry.content:
Can you please clarify: is this output triggered from the shipment or from the OBD? Because if it is triggered from the OBD then there is no reason why output one the one OBD should influence the output from another OBD.

In case the output is triggered from the shipment: then you have 2 OBDs in 1 shipment? Why do you then need two messages? You create 1 shipment so customer will receive 1 e-mail informing them over the shipment number. In case of multiple OBDs / sales orders, you can mention those numbers in the body of the e-mail.

entry.title: Re: SF-LMS: Information of the security domain an employe...
entry.content: Thank you very much for your answer! I will check it!

entry.title: Re: Counter based PM plans
entry.content:
Hi Rob91,

Yes, I do have created counter-based maintenance plans a few times. Please share the issue with us so that we can answer accordingly.

Thanks!

entry.title: Login to SAP Digital Assistant service at BTP using SAPDAS cli
entry.content:
In the blog below co-authored with @preeti_gupta3 , we will understand how to setup your BTP account, install sap digital assistant cli tools and login from your terminal to SAP Digital Assistant Service. 

BTP Account setup

You need to first subscribe to the SAP Digital Assistant application and then create an instance of SAP Digital Assistant service in SAP Business Technology Platform. Creating an instance of SAP Digital Assistant service provides access to various product APIs.

You must be a global account administrator to perform the following tasks. You must add the entitlement for SAP Digital Assistant to your global account in the SAP BTP Control Center.

Kindly refer to below url for Global account setup

https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/serviceguide/prerequisites?locale=en-US

Subscribe to SAP Digital Assistant

In the SAP BTP Cockpit, open your subaccount.

(Optional) Choose Security >Trust Configuration.

(Optional) Click Establish Trust, and then select an identity provider from the list of available and choose Establish Trust.

Go to Service Marketplace in the left navigation pane.

Look for the SAP Digital Assistant application and click the tile to open it.

Based on your entitlements, you will see the development plan under Application plans.

Click the actions menu on the right and select Create.

You have subscribed to SAP Digital Assistant.

For developing capabilities with Joule, you need to assign capability_developer role to your user.

Refer https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/service-guide/assign-roles?locale=en-US for the same.

Create A Service Instance

In the SAP BTP Cockpit, open your subaccount.

Go to the Service Marketplace in the left navigation pane. Look for the application SAP Digital Assistant and click the tile to open it. Based on your entitlements, you will see designer plan under Service plans.

Click the actions menu on the right and select Create.

Select the default values for the fields in the popup and click Create. 

Create Service Key

Select SAP Digital Assistant created above create a service key.

In the service instance details area that opens to the right, select the Actions menu.

Choose Create Service Key.

In the New Service Key wizard, choose a name for your service key and proceed with no configuration parameters for now.

Click Save.

Refer https://help.sap.com/docs/service-manager/sap-service-manager/creating-service-keys-in-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US on how to create a service key in SAP BTP.

Installing SAPDAS CLI

Prerequisites - You should have installed Node.js (minimum version 18 and maximum 21).

Open the terminal and run the following commands to -

Get the latest delivered official version

Install sapdas

 

 

npm install -g sapdas-cli --registry=https://int.repositories.cloud.sap/artifactory/api/npm/build-releases-npm

 

 

Get a specific delivered official version to install sapdas

 

 

npm install -g sapdas-cli@<version> --registry=https://int.repositories.cloud.sap/artifactory/api/npm/build-releases-npm

 

 

Replace <version> with the version number, for example, <1.0.90>

Understanding the sapdas-cli login command

The sapdas-cli login command is a fundamental command that initializes your connection to the SAP Digital Assistant service through the Command Line Interface (CLI). Let's dissect it to understand its components better.

 

 

sapdas login --default-idp --apiurl <JOULE Subscription URL> --authurl <Auth URL from Joule Service key>

 

 

Here, the command is divided into three main parts:

  1. sapdas login: This is the main command that instructs the CLI to log in to the SAP Digital Assistant service.

  2. --default-idp: This parameter is an optional flag that specifies that the default identity provider (IdP) should be used for authentication. If you have multiple IdPs configured, and you want to use a different one, you would replace this with `--idp <IDP Name>`. Navigate to menu item Security -> Trust Configuration.

    This will display all the configured IDPs for your user.

    Select IDP using which you could access Joule Subscription.

  3. --apiurl <JOULE Subscription URL>: This specifies the URL of the SAP Digital Assistant service to which you want to connect. Replace `<JOULE Subscription URL>` with your actual URL. Navigate to Service -> Instances and Subscriptions

Click on Joule subscription.

Click on Go To Application. This would take you to the Joule subscription page, displaying the IDPs using which you can access JOULE subscription. Select the IDP which is configured to enable access to JOULE for your user.

You should see something as follows. Note down the above URL. This is the SAPDAS api url used in the above command.

4. --authurl <Auth URL from Joule Service key>: This parameter is used to specify the URL of the authentication service. Replace `<Auth URL from Joule Service key>` with your actual authentication URL that was obtained from your service key.

Navigate to your space where you have created the Joule instance. Open the instance. Open the service key for Joule and note down the following fields.

Url -> (this is the authurl in the above command), Client id, Client Secret to be provided when prompted for by the sapdas cli. PFB for reference.

Once you hit enter, you will be logged into Joule from your terminal. 

In the next part, we will try to understand how do we compile and deploy a Joule capability.

Thanks

Joule

entry.title: Re: i have to change abap/shared_objects_size_MB to a bigger value
entry.content:
Hi Maximo,

1. Refer to the SAP note 2474021.

2. changing the profile parameters you have to use the transaction code RZ10 (RZ11 is only for the display)

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite trial: Cloud Integration Capabi...
entry.content:
Hi Lizaveta,

Unfortunately, this was an intermittent use. You should be able to activate the capability now.

entry.title: Issue regarding custom object aging information
entry.content:
We have recently initiated the conversion project and are utilizing Transaction SCMON to gather information on the aging of custom objects. Our objective is to monitor the system over a six-month period. However, within a few hours, SCMON generated an excessive number of entries, primarily related to system activities, which does not provide the desired insights. Therefore, we kindly request your recommendation for an alternative SAP solution to effectively collect aging information for custom objects.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue regarding custom object aging information
entry.content:
Please consider using SAP Solution Manager function 'Custom Code Management' to achieve the goal of managing custom objects lifecycle.

For how to setup and use the function, please refer to below how-to guide:
https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/e/pdf/preview/embed/BQWpoPm?ltr=a

entry.title: Assign report to C4C employees instead of assigning according to their role.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Good morning!!

I want to assign different report to C4C employees instead of assigning it according to their role. Can we do this in C4C? If Yes then what are the steps i need to follow in C4C?

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: Re: Identity Access Management (IAM) Reference Architectures 2024
entry.content: @delemento Can I ask how do you request extra tenant please?

entry.title: Issue with the intercompany PO (ICPO) pricing in our Adv IC solution implemented for Hershey
entry.content:
When a Customer SO is saved, VCM (Value Chain Monitor) creates the intercompany PO (ICPO).The pricing procedure in this ICPO includes the P101 condition type, which pulls the standard price from the material master.There are instances where the month of the SO/ICPO and delivery date differ, leading to a situation where the standard price of the material is updated through the costing process.Consequently, billing picks up the new price, but the ICPO retains the previous month's price.The VCM-initiated ICPO is not modifiable.

Issue with MEI1:SAP suggested using MEI1 as a potential solution for repricing the ICPO.However, this is not feasible because PERSON_NAME's uses a pricing procedure with the P101 condition type, which is internal and does not have an access sequence. Confirmed by the SAP Product team under separate OSS message.As a result, MEI1 cannot be used to update the price in the ICPO.

Request: Please advise on other possible options to achieve repricing for the intercompany PO, given the constraints with the P101 condition type and the non-modifiable nature of the VCM-initiated ICPO.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue with the intercompany PO (ICPO) pricing in our...
entry.content: As per standard system design MEI1 is solution for repricing the ICPO.

entry.title: Redeem $100 Off Temu Coupon Code {act200019}
entry.content:
To get $100 off at Temu for both new and existing customers, you can use the coupon code "{act200019}". Simply apply this code during checkout to redeem the discount. This offer allows you to save $100 and enjoy exclusive deals and promo codes available at Temu.

How to get Temu $100 coupon?

If you are a new customer on Temu and you want to get $100 off on your shopping, then use the latest $100 Temu coupon bundle code "{act200019}". You can also avail up to 90% off on your first purchase with Temu, and if your order exceeds $120, then you will be eligible for free shipping.

How To Redeem $100 Off Temu Coupon Code 

To redeem the $100 off Temu coupon code, follow these steps:

  1. Add the items you want to your cart on the Temu website or app.
  2. Go to the checkout page.
  3. Find the "Enter coupon code" box on the right side.
  4. Type in the coupon code, "{act200019}".
  5. Click "Apply" to use the coupon.
  6. The discount will be added to your order total automatically.

For example, you can use the coupon code "{act200019}" to get $100 off for both new and existing users. Another option is to use the code "{act200019}" to get $40 off for both new and existing users.

To ensure the coupon code is legitimate, verify it on the official Temu website or through reputable sources like LinkedIn.

How do I maximize my savings with coupon codes

Maximizing savings with coupon codes involves a combination of strategic shopping, staying informed, and leveraging multiple discount opportunities. Here are some practical tips to help you get the most out of your coupon codes:

1. Combine Coupons and Discounts

  • Stack Coupons: Use multiple coupons in a single transaction if the store allows it. For example, combine a percentage-off coupon with a free shipping offer.
  • Look for Store Promotions: Use your coupons {act200019} during store-wide sales or clearance events to maximize your savings.

2. Stay Updated on Latest Deals

  • Subscribe to Newsletters: Sign up for newsletters from your favorite retailers to receive exclusive discounts and be the first to know about upcoming sales.
  • Follow on Social Media: Follow brands and deal sites on social media for flash sales, promo codes, and giveaways.

3. Use Cashback and Rewards Programs

  • Cashback Sites: Use cashback websites like Rakuten or Honey when shopping online to earn a percentage of your purchase back.
  • Credit Card Rewards: Pay with a credit card that offers cashback or points on purchases to increase your savings.

4. Shop Smart with Timing

  • Seasonal Sales: Plan your purchases around major sales events like Black Friday, Cyber Monday, and holiday sales to take advantage of deep discounts.
  • End of Season: Buy seasonal items at the end of the season when they are heavily discounted.

5. Verify and Compare Coupons

  • Coupon Databases: Use reputable coupon databases like RetailMeNot, Coupons.com, and Honey to find and compare the best deals available.
  • Read the Fine Print: Always check the terms and conditions of the coupon code to ensure it applies to your purchase and note any restrictions or expiration dates.

6. Use Referral Codes

  • Referral Bonuses: Sign up for new services or make purchases using referral codes {act200019} to receive additional discounts or bonuses.

7. Use Price Comparison Tools

  • Price Matching: Some retailers offer price matching policies. Use this to get the lowest price available, combined with your coupon discount.
  • Comparison Tools: Use tools like Google Shopping or PriceGrabber to compare prices across different retailers before making a purchase.

8. Shop with Apps and Browser Extensions

  • Coupon Apps: Install apps like Honey, Rakuten, or RetailMeNot on your phone to get instant notifications about available coupons and deals.
  • Browser Extensions: Use browser extensions that automatically find and apply the best coupon codes for you at checkout.

Examples of How to Apply These Tips

  1. Combine Offers: Use a 20% off coupon during a store’s annual sale event and pay with a cashback credit card to save even more.
  2. Stay Updated: Follow your favorite brand on Instagram and subscribe to their newsletter to get a heads-up on exclusive 30% off flash sales.
  3. Cashback Sites: Shop through Rakuten during a double cashback event and apply a 15% off coupon at checkout.
  4. Timing: Wait for Cyber Monday to buy electronics and use a coupon code for an additional $50 off.
  5. Referral Codes: Use a friend’s referral code {act200019} when signing up for a new subscription service to get $20 off your first order.

By combining these strategies, you can maximize your savings and make the most out of every purchase. Happy shopping!

How do I get a coupon code?

Based on the search results provided, here are the key steps to get a coupon code:

  1. Shop at stores with rewards programs: Sign up for the mailing list or rewards program of retailers you frequent. They often send exclusive coupons or apply discounts automatically during checkout for members.
  2. Install a browser extension: Use a browser extension like Honey that can automatically find and apply coupon codes when you're shopping online.
  3. Ask for manufacturer coupons: Contact the brands or manufacturers directly and request coupons or samples. They may send you coupons as a way to get feedback.
  4. Check product packaging: Look for peel-off coupons attached to the packaging of products like cereal or meat.
  5. Browse store aisles: Check shelves and displays in the store for tear pads or other coupon offers.
  6. Check your receipts: Retailers often print coupons on the back of receipts or provide Catalina coupons based on your purchases.
  7. Use social media: Follow brands, stores, and products you like on social media, as they may share coupon codes there.
  8. Visit coupon websites: Sites like CouponDunia, NerdWallet, and SimplyCodes can help you find and apply working coupon codes.

The key is to be proactive in searching for coupon opportunities from a variety of sources, both digital and physical. Patience and persistence are often required to find valid, working coupon codes.

#Temu#
